root.main_tree_to_execute: Insert Hard Drive into Server Rack

BehaviorTree.ID: Insert Hard Drive into Server Rack
BehaviorTree._description: Takes a combined snapshot of the server rack, registers its point cloud for pose estimation, generates approach and goal poses for the insertion slot, and executes a slow cartesian insertion motion.

Action.name: This is the approximate hard drive insertion location relative to the localized server rack

SubTree.ID: Insert Hard Drive into Server Rack Subtree
Insert Hard Drive into Server Rack
